com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXLibraryAssemblyDetails

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXLibraryChildObject, IXObject, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXLibraryAssemblyDetails
extends IXWriteableObject, IXLibraryChildObject
    Interface representing library assembly details.
